title: DuHouse 6 Bunches Fake Carnations Bouquets, Faux Carnation Bouquets Realistic Artificial Carnations with Stems for Mother's Day, Wedding, Party, Office, Home Decor(White)
features: [Size] The height of the carnation bouquet is 30cm, the diameter of the flower head is 4cm. The bouquet is divided into 5 stems, each stem has 3 carnation flower heads. Packaging: There are 6 bundles of carnations in a box.

[Material] The heads and leaves of the carnation bouquet are made of high quality silk, safe and harmless, and the stems are made of plastic with metal wire inside, which can be bent as required to adjust the shape of the flower to fit your vase. We have also designed some matching grasses for the carnation bouquet to give it a more realistic and lifelike look.

[Easy Care] Artificial carnations don't need water or sunlight, they are easy to clean and dust-free, and their colours are long-lasting and beautiful. Artificial flowers are a great choice for those who don't have time to take care of flowers. You don't have to spend a lot of time with flowers and they can be used to decorate your home all year round.

[Great Decor] DuHouse artificial carnations are brightly coloured and lifelike, perfect for wedding bouquets, table centrepieces, flower arrangements, DIY wreaths and can complement any decor. They can also be used to decorate your kitchen, windowsill, living room, dining table, bedroom, porch, garden, balcony and any other place you want to create a warm and romantic atmosphere.

[Warm Tips] Artificial flowers in the transport or delivery process may not be able to avoid extrusion or deformation, after you receive a little adjustment can be restored. You can pat the flower head with your hand and adjust it manually to make it fuller, or you can use hot air to soften the petals and then use a hairdryer with cold air to dry and set the shape.
description: Product Description DuHouse 6 Bunches Fake Carnations Bouquets for Wedding, Party, Home Decor The perfect choice for decoration For Table For Bathroom For Kitchen For Bedroom For Living Room For Bridal Bouquet Bright and vibrant colours and lifelike shapes create a relaxed and energetic atmosphere. Sutible for outdoor, festival, party, wedding, outdoor and home decoration flower arrangement artificial centerpieces.
